title: Grimlin: Shrouded Additions
description: An Arsenal of Weapons hand-forged by The Shrouded Division of The Abyssal Empire!
body:
This is the first official add-on for my [Grimlin Weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/grimlin-weaponry) mod!

What does it add?
Well, it adds weapons made by The Shrouded Division of course!
such as The Umbral Katana, and possibly more in the future!
